  • Contact

Researcher in Computer Science

Cosimo
Rulli

I work on information retrieval at ISTI-CNR, Pisa. My research focuses on making search fast and scalable — from approximate nearest neighbor search to learned sparse representations and neural network compression.

GitHub Scholar DBLP ORCID
